title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
